headline: Man's 'I Don't Like Drama' Is The Most Dramatic Statement Anyone Has Ever Made, Proving His Point Wrong
summary: 'I hate conflict,' Jake said, starting conflict. 'That's dramatic,' his friend said. 'No it's not,' Jake said dramatically.
fullBody: Jake NoDrama begins every sentence with 'I don't like drama' — dramatically. 'I hate conflict,' Jake said, creating conflict. His friends have a bingo card. 'He's the most dramatic person I know,' one said. Jake has since created a 'no drama' Slack channel — where he posts dramatic updates about how drama-free he is. The channel has 47 members. They're all discussing Jake. 'It's not drama,' Jake said. It is.
